title: POLIS Protocol v1 Message
description: The standard shape every POLIS agent message conforms to. See POLIS_PROTOCOL_V1.md for the full field reference.

agent.description: The speaking agent's role name, e.g. 'Risk Agent'.

goal.description: Fixed, one-sentence statement of this agent's mandate.

analysis.description: The agent's free-text reasoning about the specific problem.

evidence.description: Concrete facts or citations grounding the analysis. May be empty.

objections.description: Concerns or pushback raised by the agent. May be empty.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this message was produced.
